title: Using classR
text: need organization already exists. GitHub API create one. Please make browser. also need git system collecting submissions. roster CSV least column named handle holding GitHub usernames.

title: Using classR
text: Run setup_github_token() . opens token page right scopes already selected, checks token authenticates carries repo admin:org, saves ~/.Renviron. token missing scope, tells one saves nothing.

title: Using classR
text: Please session replace organization’s name.

title: Using classR
text: Put starter files folder within working directory. , use assign_homework push every student’s repo. repo student named prefix-handle, hw1-student1 . res one row per student status ok, exists, create_error, setup_error. Rows already existed skipped. can run without trouble. default students get push access. Use permission = "admin" want students manage repos.
code: res <- assign_homework("roster.csv", "hw1_files", prefix = "hw1") res table(res$status) res[res$status %in% c("create_error", "setup_error"), ]

title: Using classR
text: Confirm every repo .

title: Using classR
text: Use update_homework() need fix add starter file assigning, push . function creates files missing overwrites files exist. Note updating overwrites whatever paths within repo. student already edited file push, version replaces latest commit. old content stays history.

title: Using classR
text: ’s function pull everyone’s work local folder. Submissions land dest/prefix/handle. can run many times need.

title: Using classR
text: Note files pushed GitHub contents API, one file per call, commit. fine small starter folders. large deeply nested projects slow noisy history… Collecting uses git, API, since moves whole repositories. Adding collaborator sends invitation. Students accept GitHub email notifications can push.

text: Cristian Roman Palacios. Author, maintainer.

what: A Minimal GitHub Classroom Replacement in R
title: A Minimal GitHub Classroom Replacement in R
text: minimal GitHub Classroom replacement R. Run course GitHub without GitHub Classroom: student gets private repo given organization, starter files get pushed , student added collaborator.

title: A Minimal GitHub Classroom Replacement in R
A Minimal GitHub Classroom Replacement in R
text: roster CSV column named handle:
code: library(classR)  setup_github_token() # once: makes, checks, and saves a token set_org("ISTA421INFO521") # each session  res <- assign_homework("roster.csv", "hw1_files", prefix = "hw1") check_homework("roster.csv", prefix = "hw1") update_homework("roster.csv", "hw1_fixes", prefix = "hw1") collect_homework("roster.csv", prefix = "hw1", dest = "submissions") student1 student2 student3

title: A Minimal GitHub Classroom Replacement in R
text: setup_github_token() opens token page right scopes, verifies token authenticates carries repo admin:org, saves ~/.Renviron. set_org() sets organization used downstream. assign_homework() creates repo per student, pushes starter files, adds student. check_homework() reports repos exist. update_homework() pushes file changes existing repos. collect_homework() clones pulls every submission locally.

title: A Minimal GitHub Classroom Replacement in R
text: organization must already exist. Files pushed contents API, one file per commit. update_homework() overwrites files given paths. Collecting needs git system. Adding collaborator sends invitation student must accept can push.

what: Create repositories for a whole roster — assign_homework
title: Create repositories for a whole roster — assign_homework
text: Reads roster CSV runs create_student_repo() student, returns data frame summarizing status repo.

title: Create repositories for a whole roster — assign_homework
code: assign_homework(   roster_csv,   files_dir,   prefix = "hw1",   permission = "push",   pause = 1 )

title: Create repositories for a whole roster — assign_homework
text: roster_csv Path CSV column named "handle". files_dir Local folder contents pushed repo. prefix Assignment prefix. repo named prefix-student. permission Collaborator permission, "push" "admin". pause Seconds wait students, stay clear rate limits.

title: Create repositories for a whole roster — assign_homework
text: data frame one row per student: student, repo, status.

title: Create repositories for a whole roster — assign_homework
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ set_org("ISTA421INFO521") res <- assign_homework("roster.csv", "hw1_files", prefix = "hw1") table(res$status) } # }

title: Collect students submission — collect_homework
text: Clones student's repository local folder, pulls latest commits already cloned. Submissions land dest/prefix/student.

title: Collect students submission — collect_homework
Collect students submission — collect_homework
text: roster_csv Path CSV column named "handle". prefix Assignment prefix. repo named prefix-student. dest Folder collect . Defaults working directory.

title: Collect students submission — collect_homework
text: data frame one row per student: student, repo, status. Status "cloned", "pulled", "error".

title: Collect students submission — collect_homework
text: function uses git, API. git must available system. token read GITHUB_PAT passed git duration clone pull.

title: Collect students submission — collect_homework

what: Create one student's repository and push starter files — create_student_repo
title: Create one student's repository and push starter files — create_student_repo
text: Creates fresh private repository organization, pushes every file local folder contents API, adds student collaborator. repository already exists left alone function reports , call safe repeat.

title: Create one student's repository and push starter files — create_student_repo
Create one student's repository and push starter files — create_student_repo
text: student GitHub username (handle). files_dir Local folder whose contents pushed repo. prefix Assignment prefix. repo named prefix-student. permission Collaborator permission. "push" lets student commit work. "admin" also lets manage repo.

title: Create one student's repository and push starter files — create_student_repo
text: one row data frame student, repo, status. Status one "ok", "exists", "create_error", "setup_error".

title: Create one student's repository and push starter files — create_student_repo

what: classR: a minimal GitHub Classroom replacement in R — ghclassroom-package
title: classR: a minimal GitHub Classroom replacement in R — ghclassroom-package
text: Runs course GitHub R without GitHub Classroom. student gets fresh private repository organization, set starter files pushed , student added collaborator.

title: classR: a minimal GitHub Classroom replacement in R — ghclassroom-package
text: Typical flow: setup_github_token() , set_org() session, assign_homework() create repos, check_homework() verify, update_homework() push fixes, collect_homework() pull submissions.

title: classR: a minimal GitHub Classroom replacement in R — ghclassroom-package
text: Maintainer: Cristian Roman-Palacios cromanpa@arizona.edu

title: Set the GitHub organization — set_org
text: Stores organization login used functions package. Call per session creating collecting repositories.

Set the GitHub organization — set_org

text: organization login, invisibly.
